name: deep-review
description: Deep, scope-adaptive code review (+ optional --fix) for Claude Code: scope resolver (PR / branch / range / path / subsystem / whole-product / no-git), independent multi-angle sub-agent fan-out (correctness + connections/contracts + UI/a11y + cleanup/conventions), per-candidate verification (intent + reachability + live-vs-latent), a gap sweep, and an opt-in severity-batched, test-gated, revert-on-regression correction mode.
